VERDICT: FAIL

1. `just gov-check` still fails on the committed merge candidate `40c983ca1748d44c3e3dcbf68ab5c0ebf067e9b0` with `[BUILD_ORDER_CHECK] .GOV/roles_shared/BUILD_ORDER.md is out of date. Run: just build-order-sync`. I verified this diagnostically in the detached validation worktree: `just build-order-sync` succeeded and `git diff -- .GOV/roles_shared/BUILD_ORDER.md` produced a real diff against the committed file, so the committed sync is still incomplete. File: [BUILD_ORDER.md](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-VALTMP-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1-40c983c/.GOV/roles_shared/BUILD_ORDER.md).

2. The Schema WP itself remains technically green. `just validator-packet-complete WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1` passed, `just post-work WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1 --rev HEAD` passed, and the acceptance tests covering the required WP work passed at [micro_task_executor_tests.rs](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-VALTMP-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1-40c983c/src/backend/handshake_core/tests/micro_task_executor_tests.rs#L1129), [role_mailbox_tests.rs](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-VALTMP-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1-40c983c/src/backend/handshake_core/tests/role_mailbox_tests.rs#L541), and [role_mailbox_tests.rs](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-VALTMP-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1-40c983c/src/backend/handshake_core/tests/role_mailbox_tests.rs#L576). Micro-task packet+summary emission, mailbox-index validation, packet evidence completeness, and packet scope discipline are not the blocker.

- `git worktree add --detach "D:\Projects\LLM projects\Handshake\Handshake Worktrees\wt-VALTMP-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1-40c983c" 40c983ca1748d44c3e3dcbf68ab5c0ebf067e9b0`

- `cargo test --manifest-path src/backend/handshake_core/Cargo.toml --target-dir D:\hct --test role_mailbox_tests role_mailbox_index_api_`
